TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Soulat ki kavouytan ti Jezus Christus, ka na alak ti David, ka na alak ti Abraham.
Soulat ki kavouytan ti Jezus Christus, ka na alak ti David, ka na alak ti Abraham.
S.TRANS: Get Boeck des Geslachetes Jesy Christi, des soons Dabids des soons Abrahams.
The book of the generation of Jesus Christ, the son of David, the son of Abraham.
亞伯拉罕的後裔，大衛的子孫，耶穌基督的家譜：

S.FORM: Ti Abraham ta ni-pou-alak ti Isaac-an, ti Isaac ta ni-pou-alak ti Jakob-an, ti Jacob ta ni-pou-alak ti Juda-an, ki tæ'i-a-papar'ap-pa tyn-da.
Ti Abraham ta ni-pou-alak ti Isaac-an, ti Isaac ta ni-pou-alak ti Jakob-an, ti Jacob ta ni-pou-alak ti Juda-an, ki tæ'i-a-papar'ap-pa tyn-da.
S.TRANS: Abraham gewan Jacob. ende Isaac gewan Jacob. ende Jacob ghewan Judam ende sijne broeders.
Abraham begat Isaac; and Isaac begat Jacob; and Jacob begat Judas and his brethren;
亞伯拉罕生以撒；以撒生雅各；雅各生猶大和他的弟兄；

S.FORM: Ti Judas ta ni-pou-alak na Fares-an na Zara-an-appa p'ouhkoua ti Thamar-an. Ti Fares ta ni-pou-alak ti Esrom-an. Ti Esrom ta ni-pou-alak ti Aram-an.
Ti Judas ta ni-pou-alak na Fares-an na Zara-an-appa p'ouhkoua ti Thamar-an. Ti Fares ta ni-pou-alak ti Esrom-an. Ti Esrom ta ni-pou-alak ti Aram-an.
S.TRANS: Ende Judas ghewan Phares ende Zara by Thamar. ende Phares ghewan Esrom. ende Esrom gewan Aram.
And Judas begat Phares and Zara of Thamar; and Phares begat Esrom; and Esrom begat Aram;
猶大從她瑪氏生法勒斯和謝拉；法勒斯生希斯崙；希斯崙生亞蘭；

S.FORM: Ti Aram ta ni-pou-alak ti Aminadab-an. Ti Aminadab-an ta ni-pou-alak ti Naasson-an. Ti Naasson ta ni-pou-alak ti Salmon-an.
Ti Aram ta ni-pou-alak ti Aminadab-an. Ti Aminadab-an ta ni-pou-alak ti Naasson-an. Ti Naasson ta ni-pou-alak ti Salmon-an.
S.TRANS: Ende Aram gewan Aminadab. ende Aminadab gewan Naasson. ende Naasson gewan Salmon.
And Aram begat Aminadab; and Aminadab begat Naasson; and Naasson begat Salmon;
亞蘭生亞米拿達；亞米拿達生拿順；拿順生撒門；

S.FORM: Ti Salmon ta ni-pou-alak na Boös-an p'ouh-koua ti Rachab-an. Ti Boös ta ni-pou-alak na Obed-an p'ouh-koua ti Ruth-an. Ti Obed ta ni-pou-alak ti Jesse-an.
Ti Salmon ta ni-pou-alak na Boös-an p'ouh-koua ti Rachab-an. Ti Boös ta ni-pou-alak na Obed-an p'ouh-koua ti Ruth-an. Ti Obed ta ni-pou-alak ti Jesse-an.
S.TRANS: Ende Salmon ghewan Booz by Rachab. ende Booz gewan Obed by Ruth. ende Obed ghewan Jesse
And Salmon begat Booz of Rachab; and Booz begat Obed of Ruth; and Obed begat Jesse;
撒門從喇合氏生波阿斯；波阿斯從路得氏生俄備得；俄備得生耶西；

S.FORM: Ti Jesse ta ni pou-alak ti David-an ka na Mei-sasou ka Si bavau. Ti David ka na Mei-sasou ta ni-pou-alak ti Salomon-an p'ouh-koua koua tyni-an [ka ni-keia] ti Urias.
Ti Jesse ta ni pou-alak ti David-an ka na Mei-sasou ka Si bavau. Ti David ka na Mei-sasou ta ni-pou-alak ti Salomon-an p'ouh-koua koua tyni-an [ka ni-keia] ti Urias.
S.TRANS: Ende Jesse ghewan Dabid den Koningh. ende Dabid de Koningh gewan Salomon by de ghene die urias urias [ wijf was geweest.]
And Jesse begat David the king; and David the king begat Solomon of her that had been the wife of Urias;
耶西生大衛王。

S.FORM: Ti Salomon ta ni-pou-alak ti Roboam-an. Ti Roboam ta ni-pou-alak ti Abia-an. Ti Abia ta ni-pou-alakti Asa-an.
Ti Salomon ta ni-pou-alak ti Roboam-an. Ti Roboam ta ni-pou-alak ti Abia-an. Ti Abia ta ni-pou-alakti Asa-an.
S.TRANS: Ende Salomon ghewan Roboam. ende Roboam gewan Abia. ende Abia gewan Asa.
And Solomon begat Roboam; and Roboam begat Abia; and Abia begat Asa;
所羅門生羅波安；羅波安生亞比雅；亞比雅生亞撒；

S.FORM: Ti Asa ta ni-pou-alak ti Josafat-an. Ti Josafat ta ni-pou-alak ti Ozias-an.
Ti Asa ta ni-pou-alak ti Josafat-an. Ti Josafat ta ni-pou-alak ti Ozias-an.
S.TRANS: Ende Asa gewan Josaphat. ende Josaphat gewan Joram. ende Joram gewan Oziam.
And Asa begat Josaphat; and Josaphat begat Joram; and Joram begat Ozias;
亞撒生約沙法；約沙法生約蘭；約蘭生烏西雅；

S.FORM: Ti Ozias ta ni-pou-alak ti Joatham-an. Ti Joatham ta ni-pou-alak ti Achaz-an. Ti Achaz ta ni-pou-alak ti Ezechias-an.
Ti Ozias ta ni-pou-alak ti Joatham-an. Ti Joatham ta ni-pou-alak ti Achaz-an. Ti Achaz ta ni-pou-alak ti Ezechias-an.
S.TRANS: Ende Ozias ghewan Joatham. ende Joatham gewan Achar. ende Achaz gewan Ezekiam.
And Ozias begat Joatham; and Joatham begat Achaz; and Achaz begat Ezekias;
烏西雅生約坦；約坦生亞哈斯；亞哈斯生希西家；

S.FORM: Ti Ezechias ta ni-pou-alak ti Manasses-an. Ti Manasses ta ni-pou-alak ti Amon-an. Ti Amon ta ni-pou-alak ti Josias-an.
Ti Ezechias ta ni-pou-alak ti Manasses-an. Ti Manasses ta ni-pou-alak ti Amon-an. Ti Amon ta ni-pou-alak ti Josias-an.
S.TRANS: Ende Ezekias ghewan Manasse. ende Manasse gewan Amon. ende Amon gewan Josiam.
And Ezekias begat Manasses; and Manasses begat Amon; and Amon begat Josias;
希西家生瑪拿西；瑪拿西生亞們；亞們生約西亞；

S.FORM: Ti Josias ta ni-pou-alak ti Jechonias-an, ki tæ'i-a-papar'appa tyn tou [tamang ki] kidi ki takalla-eih pou-loua tou Babilon.
Ti Josias ta ni-pou-alak ti Jechonias-an, ki tæ'i-a-papar'appa tyn tou [tamang ki] kidi ki takalla-eih pou-loua tou Babilon.
S.TRANS: Ende Josias gewan Jechoniam ende sijne broeders ontrent de Babylonische oberboeringe.
And Josias begat Jechonias and his brethren, about the time they were carried away to Babylon:
百姓被遷到巴比倫的時候，約西亞生耶哥尼雅和他的弟兄。

S.FORM: Tou ǣuh-appa ki ni-ta-kall'an tou Babilon ni-pou-alak ta ti Jechonias ti Salathiël-an, Ti Salathiël ta ni-pou-alak ti Zorobabel-an.
Tou ǣuh-appa ki ni-ta-kall'an tou Babilon ni-pou-alak ta ti Jechonias ti Salathiël-an, Ti Salathiël ta ni-pou-alak ti Zorobabel-an.
S.TRANS: Ende na de Babylonische oberboeringhe gewan Jechonias Salathiel. ende Salathiel gewan Zorobabel.
And after they were brought to Babylon, Jechonias begat Salathiel; and Salathiel begat Zorobabel;
遷到巴比倫之後，耶哥尼雅生撒拉鐵；撒拉鐵生所羅巴伯；

S.FORM: Ti Zorobabel ta ni-pou-alak ti Abiud-an. Ti Abiud ta ni-pou-alak ti Eliakim-an. Ti Elia-kim ta ni-pou-alak ti Azor-an.
Ti Zorobabel ta ni-pou-alak ti Abiud-an. Ti Abiud ta ni-pou-alak ti Eliakim-an. Ti Elia-kim ta ni-pou-alak ti Azor-an.
S.TRANS: Ende Zorobabel gewan Abiud. ende Abiud gewan Eliakim. ende Eliakim gewan Azor.
And Zorobabel begat Abiud; and Abiud begat Eliakim; and Eliakim begat Azor;
所羅巴伯生亞比玉；亞比玉生以利亞敬；以利亞敬生亞所；

S.FORM: Ti azor ta ni-pou-alak ti Sadok-an. Ti Sadokta ni-pou-alak ti Achim-an. Ti Achim ta ni-pou-alak ti Eliud-an.
Ti azor ta ni-pou-alak ti Sadok-an. Ti Sadokta ni-pou-alak ti Achim-an. Ti Achim ta ni-pou-alak ti Eliud-an.
S.TRANS: Ende Azor ghewan Sadok. ende Sadok ghewan Achim. ende Achim gewan Eliud.
And Azor begat Sadoc; and Sadoc begat Achim; and Achim begat Eliud;
亞所生撒督；撒督生亞金；亞金生以律；

S.FORM: Ti Eliud ta ni-pou-alak ti Eleazar-an. Ti Eleazar ta ni-pou-alak ti Matthan-an. Ti Matthan ta ni-pou-alak ti Jakob-an.
Ti Eliud ta ni-pou-alak ti Eleazar-an. Ti Eleazar ta ni-pou-alak ti Matthan-an. Ti Matthan ta ni-pou-alak ti Jakob-an.
S.TRANS: Ende Elind gewan EleaEleazar. ende Eleazar gewan Matthan. ende Matthan gewan Jacob.
And Eliud begat Eleazar; and Eleazar begat Matthan; and Matthan begat Jacob;
以律生以利亞撒；以利亞撒生馬但；馬但生雅各；

S.FORM: Ti Jakob ta ni-pou-alak ti Josef-an, ka mou-kou-qua-ah ti Maria-an, ka ni-pei-alak tyn ta ti Jesus, ka pa-nanang-en ki sioua ti Christus
Ti Jakob ta ni-pou-alak ti Josef-an, ka mou-kou-qua-ah ti Maria-an, ka ni-pei-alak tyn ta ti Jesus, ka pa-nanang-en ki sioua ti Christus
S.TRANS: Ende Jacob gewan Joseph den Man ban Maria uyt welcke geboren is Jesus, geseght Christus.
And Jacob begat Joseph the husband of Mary, of whom was born Jesus, who is called Christ.
雅各生約瑟，就是馬利亞的丈夫。那稱為基督的耶穌是從馬利亞生的。

S.FORM: Anna ta ymmid ki kavouivouyl-an-na Abraham tou kidi ti David, faät-ato kyttiæn'æb ki pat ki kavouivouyl-an. Ka na David, tou kidi ki takalla-eih poukua tou Babilon faät-ato kyttiæn'æb ki pat ki kavouivouyl-an-da.

Anna ta ymmid ki kavouivouyl-an-na Abraham tou kidi ti David, faät-ato kyttiæn'æb ki pat ki kavouivouyl-an. Ka na David, tou kidi ki takalla-eih poukua tou Babilon faät-ato kyttiæn'æb ki pat ki kavouivouyl-an-da.
S.TRANS: Alle de Gheslachten dan ban Abraham tot Dabid [zijn] beertien geslachten ende ban Dabid tot de Babylonische oberboeringhe [zijn] beertien gheslachten ende ban de Babylonische oberborringe tot Christum [ zijn ] beertien geslachten.

So all the generations from Abraham to David are fourteen generations; and from David until the carrying away into Babylon are fourteen generations; and from the carrying away into Babylon unto Christ are fourteen generations.
這樣，從亞伯拉罕到大衛共有十四代；從大衛到遷至巴比倫的時候也有十四代；從遷至巴比倫的時候到基督又有十四代。 （路2‧1－7）

S.FORM: Ka ni-pei-alak-en ti Jefus Christus-an ta na k'm'ato-hynna; Irou ka ni-maä-mamado masashut ta ti Josef ka pakakitil-eih ti Maria ka Dena tyn, ka assi-appa ni-tæ-'ǣlam, ni-ǣi-vavalei ka akoukavoui-in ta teni ki na Joep-an ka Dilligh Matiktik.

Ka ni-pei-alak-en ti Jefus Christus-an ta na k'm'ato-hynna; Irou ka ni-maä-mamado masashut ta ti Josef ka pakakitil-eih ti Maria ka Dena tyn, ka assi-appa ni-tæ-'ǣlam, ni-ǣi-vavalei ka akoukavoui-in ta teni ki na Joep-an ka Dilligh Matiktik.
S.TRANS: De gheboorte Jesu Christti was nu aldus: want als Maria sijne Moeder met Joleph ondertrout was eer sy te samen gekomen waren wiert sy swanger bebonden uyt den Heylighen Geeat.
Now the birth of Jesus Christ was on this wise: When as his mother Mary was espoused to Joseph, before they came together, she was found with child of the Holy Ghost.
耶穌基督降生的事記在下面：他母親馬利亞已經許配了約瑟，還沒有迎娶，馬利亞就從聖靈懷了孕。

S.FORM: Nda ti Josef ka 'ou-kou-quȧ-auh tyn, alei ka na matiktik ta teni, ka ni-ynnang-en tyn pakaæmægh paka-nğala tyni æn, ni-pou-rarygh ki faou-ouzoung-en fau-tau-wagh tyni-æn.
Nda ti Josef ka 'ou-kou-quȧ-auh tyn, alei ka na matiktik ta teni, ka ni-ynnang-en tyn pakaæmægh paka-nğala tyni æn, ni-pou-rarygh ki faou-ouzoung-en fau-tau-wagh tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: Joseph nu haren man alsoo hy rechtbeerdigh was ende haer niet en wilde openbaerlick te schande maken was ban wille haer heymelick te berlaten.
Then Joseph her husband, being a just man, and not willing to make her a publick example, was minded to put her away privily.
她丈夫約瑟是個義人，不願意明明地羞辱她，想要暗暗地把她休了。

S.FORM: Heirou ka pæg-dimdim-un tyn ta atta; kytt'ey ta Tama-Gnau ki MEIRANG ta ni-mou-pænæh tyni-æn tou malling, ka ni-k'ma; Josef ka na alak ti David, ynna mahtakout mæiǣ pou-qua ymhou-an ti Maria-an ka ta'æu-pæu-pæu-ei-mou-hou: ka atta ka nikavouë tyn, na Joepan ta anna ka Dilligh Matiktik.

Heirou ka pæg-dimdim-un tyn ta atta; kytt'ey ta Tama-Gnau ki MEIRANG ta ni-mou-pænæh tyni-æn tou malling, ka ni-k'ma; Josef ka na alak ti David, ynna mahtakout mæiǣ pou-qua ymhou-an ti Maria-an ka ta'æu-pæu-pæu-ei-mou-hou: ka atta ka nikavouë tyn, na Joepan ta anna ka Dilligh Matiktik.
S.TRANS: Ende alsoo hy dese dingen in den sin hadde siet de Engel des Heeren berscheen scheen hem in den droom seggende Joseph [ghy] sone Dabids en zijt met bebreest Mariam uw' wijf tot u te nemen. Want het ghene in haer ontsangen is dat is uyt den Heyligen Geest.

But while he thought on these things, behold, the angel of the LORD appeared unto him in a dream, saying, Joseph, thou son of David, fear not to take unto thee Mary thy wife: for that which is conceived in her is of the Holy Ghost.
正思念這事的時候，有主的使者向他夢中顯現，說：「大衛的子孫約瑟，不要怕！只管娶過你的妻子馬利亞來，因她所懷的孕是從聖靈來的。

S.FORM: Ka mei-alak-ah ki alak ka pæræh, ka faki-nanang-ei-'mhou ta nanangah tyn Jesus; alei ka Tama-paka-ri-ang-ah ki tau tyn. ki varau nein.
Ka mei-alak-ah ki alak ka pæræh, ka faki-nanang-ei-'mhou ta nanangah tyn Jesus; alei ka Tama-paka-ri-ang-ah ki tau tyn. ki varau nein.
S.TRANS: Ende sy sal eenen sone baren ende ghy sult sijnen Name heeten Jesus. Want hy sal sijn bolck saligh maken ban hare sonden.
And she shall bring forth a son, and thou shalt call his name JESUS: for he shall save his people from their sins.
她將要生一個兒子，你要給他起名叫耶穌，因他要將自己的百姓從罪惡裏救出來。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-mam'tato ta ma-mang k'atta alei ka pa-væut-auh ta na fou ki MERIRANG pa-pattæi-tounoun ki Tama-mattæi-tan, ka ni-k'ma;
Ka ni-mam'tato ta ma-mang k'atta alei ka pa-væut-auh ta na fou ki MERIRANG pa-pattæi-tounoun ki Tama-mattæi-tan, ka ni-k'ma;
S.TRANS: Ende dit alles is geschiet op dat berbult soude worden het gene ban den Heere gesproken is door den Propheet seggende
Now all this was done, that it might be fulfilled which was spoken of the Lord by the prophet, saying,
這一切的事成就是要應驗主藉先知所說的話，

S.FORM: Kytt'ey, akou-me-'ah ki kavoui-in ta Tmattoul ka assi 'ouparæ'-in, ka mei-alak-ah ki alak ka paræh, ka smaki-nanang-ah-kow ki uanang tyn, Emmanuël, teni ki fou dou pahaviri-viri-in tou lam ymytæn ta Alid.

Kytt'ey, akou-me-'ah ki kavoui-in ta Tmattoul ka assi 'ouparæ'-in, ka mei-alak-ah ki alak ka paræh, ka smaki-nanang-ah-kow ki uanang tyn, Emmanuël, teni ki fou dou pahaviri-viri-in tou lam ymytæn ta Alid.
S.TRANS: Siet de Maget sal swanger worden ende eenen sone baren ende ghy sult sijnen Name heeten Emmanuel het welck is obergeset sijnde Godt met ons.
Behold, a virgin shall be with child, and shall bring forth a son, and they shall call his name Emmanuel, which being interpreted is, God with us.
說：

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-patti-mæuǣ'-in ta ti Josef ki ni'irp-en tyn, ni-ah-qua tyn mama ki na sikakidi ki Tama Gnau ki MEIRANG tyniæn, ka ni-pa-ou-qua tyni-æn ki 'ou-kouqua-auh tyn.
Irou ka ni-patti-mæuǣ'-in ta ti Josef ki ni'irp-en tyn, ni-ah-qua tyn mama ki na sikakidi ki Tama Gnau ki MEIRANG tyniæn, ka ni-pa-ou-qua tyni-æn ki 'ou-kouqua-auh tyn.
S.TRANS: Joseph dan opgheweckt zijnde ban den slaep dede geliick de Engel des Heeren hem beboolen hadde ende heeft sijn wijf tot hem genomen.
Then Joseph being raised from sleep did as the angel of the Lord had bidden him, and took unto him his wife:
約瑟醒了，起來，就遵着主使者的吩咐把妻子娶過來；

S.FORM: Ka assi tyn kalang-en ta teni, tou kidi ki ni-pei-kah'an tyn mei-alak ta alak tyn ka si-nḡada, ka ni-smaki-nanang tyni-an ki nanang ka Jesus.
Ka assi tyn kalang-en ta teni, tou kidi ki ni-pei-kah'an tyn mei-alak ta alak tyn ka si-nḡada, ka ni-smaki-nanang tyni-an ki nanang ka Jesus.
S.TRANS: Ende en bekende haer niet tot datse desen haren eerst-geboren sone gebaert hadde: ende hiet sijnen Name Jesus.
And knew her not till she had brought forth her firstborn son: and he called his name JESUS.
只是沒有和她同房，等她生了兒子，就給他起名叫耶穌。
